full_text:
Lady Jiang
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Jiang. Urged her son to attack Ma Chao. Executed by Ma Chao after insulting him. Lady Jiang was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Lady Jiang lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
